title: Chlorophytum limosum

taxonomy: Chlorophytum limosum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It is part of the genus Chlorophytum, which is a group of plants commonly known as spider plants. The family Asparagaceae is a large group of plants that includes asparagus, hyacinths, and lilies, among others. Chlorophytum limosum is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Its classification is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta.
